programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.sub-title: A New Scoreboard and a Horse's You Know What
programme.desc: Georgie and Fagenbacher go head-to-head when Fagenbacher tries to sabotage Georgie's attempt to honor his dad.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When new pressures threaten Sam and Jay's control over Woodstone, they're forced to navigate unexpected challenges to protect its future; a long-absent ghost returns, reopening emotional connections that complicate new relationships.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: After a billionaire's son dies in a motorcycle crash, Elsbeth investigates a wealth therapist whose knowledge of her patients' secrets led to murder.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: Elsbeth battles a wealthy biohacker who will do anything to stay young, including an extreme diet, vigorous exercise -- and murder.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Lizzo; podcast hosts Gail Rudnick and Kim Murstein; Artemis II mission astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch and Jeremy Hansen.

programme.desc: Costumed contestants compete for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Victor forces Nick to come clean; Victoria prepares her defense against Phyllis; Sharon questions Sienna's loyalty.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat and Martin plot to help their parents; Nicole and Ted mark their anniversary with warm memories; Vernon redirects Martin's debt to Joey onto himself; Naomi puts Bill in check regarding his feelings for Dani; Tomas gives an update.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Game show host Deborah Norville ("The Perfect Line"); chef Nicole McLaughlin shares dirt-cheap dinner options.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Matthew McConaughey talks about his book "Poems & Prayers" and his movie "The Lost Bus.".

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Catfight Over a Jailbird!; Uber Boyfriend Dispute
programme.desc: Two older women fight over an incarcerated man; a man sues his ex-boyfriend for repayment of a loan, but the ex calls it a joint investment.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Boys on the Hood!; Childcare Miscalculation
programme.desc: A young woman whose boyfriend jumped on top of her grandmother's car wants payback for damages; a woman sues her ex-friend for payment for childcare services.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: Sheriff Mickey Fox investigates a fatal shooting that appears to be a tragic accident during a lavish Fraley family boar hunt, setting off a chain of events with far-reaching consequences for Edgewater.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: When a powerful storm sends a massive telephone pole crashing through a family home and traps a woman inside, station 42 races against time to try and pull off a dangerous rescue.

programme.desc: When a captured serial killer hints at the whereabouts of a missing child, Danny teams up with a familiar ally in a tense race against time; health scares and long-kept family secrets surface, forcing members of the team to confront personal truths.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: CBS LA Mornings at 6am
programme.desc: Start your day with CBS LA Mornings, covering breaking stories from The Desk, and NEXT Weather and Traffic for Southern California.

programme.title: CBS LA Mornings at 7am
programme.desc: Start your day with CBS LA Mornings, covering breaking stories from The Desk, and NEXT Weather and Traffic for Southern California.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Reunions
programme.desc: Animal trainer Brandon McMillan returns to the Lucky Dog Ranch, where he revisits some of the most heartwarming and illuminating rescue stories from his past. Brandon re-lives his experiences rescuing and training shelter dogs and pairing them with a forever family with a need in their own lives. At the end of each episode, Brandon reunite with the family to find out how the addition of a cuddly canine has made a lasting impact on each member. Each episode celebrates second chances -- for both pets and people -- as the dogs are rescued from euthanasia, trained and placed within a loving home. Along the way, one can learn valuable pet training techniques as well as the history of each breed -- and how to use that lineage to set each dog on the path to success.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Down Under
programme.desc: Host Brandon McMillan showcases the heartwarming stories of Australian shelter dogs as they transition from rescue and rehabilitation to cherished members of loving families. Whether it's a scrappy terrier, an energetic kelpie or a partially deaf cattle dog, audiences discover that second chances can transform lives on both ends of the leash. This original series is based on the hit international format "The Dog House Australia.".

programme.title: Mission Unstoppable
programme.desc: Highlighting the fascinating female innovators who are on the cutting edge of science -- including zoologists, engineers, astronauts, codebreakers and oceanographers. Host Miranda Cosgrove profiles female STEM (science, technology, engineering and math) superstars in the fields of social media, entertainment, animals, design and the internet -- all categories key to the teen experience. Academy Award-winning actress Geena Davis serves as executive producer, bringing her passion for creating change in the portrayal of strong female characters in entertainment and media that positively influences young viewers, along with Cosgrove.

programme.title: Live: PPA Tour Pickleball
programme.desc: From Peachtree Corners, Ga.

programme.title: Unscripted
programme.desc: Inside the ropes at the RBC Heritage with Kurt Kitayama, one of professional golf's rising stars. Go behind the scenes as the two-time PGA TOUR winner prepares for the week, navigates the pressure of competition, and dives into his journey so far.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third round of the PGA Tour signature event gets underway at Trump National Doral in Miami. Golfers face the grueling 7,600-yard Blue Monster layout as they jockey for position to earn a massive slice of the eight-figure financial reward.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: The Visioneers With Zay Harding
programme.desc: International explorer Zay Harding takes viewers around the world as he showcases the remarkable scientists, engineers and everyday people who are creating environmental solutions.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee and Torres try to recover a stolen truck filled with toys for the Navy's annual Christmas drive; the truth about Parker's mother is finally revealed; Knight is tasked with tracking down a former member of the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins
programme.desc: As the team discovers Gibbs' drunken Vegas elopement with Diane, the newlyweds contemplate their future; the team investigates a fatal movie theater bombing with a connection to the Pruitt compound where Franks' brother Mason is staying.
